supported_devices: CO2 generators, CO2 solenoid valves, CO2 cylinders, ventilation fans
port_types: Schuko CO2 outlet, Schuko fan outlet, RJ45 sensor port
compatible_sensors: TechGrow S-4 only (0–2000 ppm or 0–10 000 ppm); S-2, S-Eco, and temperature probes not compatible
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 generator or solenoid valve (230 V, max 8 A)
recommended_use_note: Extended T-1 Pro with climate control; simultaneously regulates CO2, temperature, and humidity via dedicated relay outputs; available in 3 fan-relay variants (4.5 A, 7 A, 14 A)
uvp_notes: 7 A variant controller only (sensor sold separately); 4.5 A variant from €458.68, 14 A from €554.50 on techgrow.nl; Amazon listing B084VSK1V6 is 4.5 A bundle with S-4 sensor
notes: Pro series multi-function controller; T-1 Pro with added climate (temperature + humidity) control via relay-switched fan output; 4×20 char LCD; three fan-relay variants: 4.5 A (up to ~1000 m³/h), 7 A (up to 5000 m³/h), 14 A (up to 10 000 m³/h); fan output is mains-relay on/off only — not EC fan variable-speed control; requires S-4 sensor exclusively; temperature range 10–45 °C, humidity 0–100% RH; 7-day CO2 dosing counter log; pulse dosing and dosing delay functions; compatible with DL-1 datalogger; firmware v2.13 (dated 2019-02-03); dimensions are for 7 A variant (4.5 A variant is 21×22×10 cm)
